title: ozoroa pallida
intro: Ozoroa pallida is a succulent plant species native to tropical Africa, commonly known as the 'Yellow Stinkwood' due to its strong, unpleasant odor when crushed. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ozoroa pallida include wound healing, reduction of fever, and relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Ozoroa pallida include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments, including skin conditions, digestive issues, and infections.
